# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with attached EBS volumes for application data (fast start; encryption/backups to be added later)

Parameters:
  VpcId:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC::Id
  SubnetIds:
    Type: List<AWS::EC2::Subnet::Id>
  InstanceType:
    Type: String
    Default: t3.medium
    AllowedValues:
      - t3.micro
      - t3.small
      - t3.medium
      - t3.large
      - t3.xlarge
      - t3a.micro
      - t3a.small
      - t3a.medium
      - t3a.large
      - t3a.xlarge
      - m6i.large
      - m6i.xlarge
      - m6i.2xlarge
      - c6i.large
      - c6i.xlarge
      - c6i.2xlarge
  KeyName:
    Type: AWS::EC2::KeyPair::KeyName
  InstanceCount:
    Type: Number
    Default: 2
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 6
  RootVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 30
    MinValue: 8
    MaxValue: 1024
  DataVolumeSizeGiB:
    Type: Number
    Default: 200
    MinValue: 1
    MaxValue: 16384
  DataVolumeType:
    Type: String
    Default: gp3
    AllowedValues:
      - gp3
      - gp2
      - io1
      - io2
      - st1
      - sc1
      - standard
  DataDeviceName:
    Type: String
    Default: /dev/sdf
  LatestAmiId:
    Type: AWS::SSM::Parameter::Value<AWS::EC2::Image::Id>
    Default: /aws/service/ami-amazon-linux-latest/al2023-ami-kernel-6.1-x86_64
  ApplicationName:
    Type: String
    Default: app
  SSHCidr:
    Type: String
    Default: 0.0.0.0/0

Conditions:
  CreateInstance2: !Not [!Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 1]]
  CreateInstance3: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 3]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
  CreateInstance4: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 4]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
  CreateInstance5: !Or
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 5]
    - !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]
  CreateInstance6: !Equals [!Ref InstanceCount, 6]

Resources:
  InstanceSecurityGroup:
    Type: AWS::EC2::SecurityGroup
    Properties:
      GroupDescription: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-ec2-sg
      VpcId: !Ref VpcId
      SecurityGroupIngress:
        - IpProtocol: tcp
          FromPort: 22
          ToPort: 22
          CidrIp: !Ref SSHCidr
      SecurityGroupEgress:
        - IpProtocol: -1
          CidrIp: 0.0.0.0/0
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-ec2-sg

  InstanceRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: ec2.amazonaws.com
            Action: sts:AssumeRole
      ManagedPolicyArns:
        - arn:aws:iam::aws:policy/AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore
      Path: /
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-ec2-role

  InstanceProfile:
    Type: AWS::IAM::InstanceProfile
    Properties:
      Path: /
      Roles:
        - !Ref InstanceRole

  LaunchTemplate:
    Type: AWS::EC2::LaunchTemplate
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplateName: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-lt-${AWS::StackName}
      LaunchTemplateData:
        ImageId: !Ref LatestAmiId
        InstanceType: !Ref InstanceType
        KeyName: !Ref KeyName
        IamInstanceProfile:
          Arn: !GetAtt InstanceProfile.Arn
        SecurityGroupIds:
          - !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
        MetadataOptions:
          HttpTokens: required
          HttpEndpoint: enabled
        BlockDeviceMappings:
          - DeviceName: /dev/xvda
            Ebs:
              VolumeSize: !Ref RootVolumeSizeGiB
              VolumeType: gp3
              DeleteOnTermination: true
        UserData:
          Fn::Base64: !Sub |
            #!/bin/bash
            set -euxo pipefail

            dnf -y update || true
            dnf -y install nvme-cli xfsprogs || true

            DEVICE="${DataDeviceName}"
            NVME_DEV=""
            if lsblk -ndo NAME,TYPE | grep -q "^nvme.* disk$"; then
              NVME_DEV="$(nvme list 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR>2 && $1 ~ /^\/dev\/nvme/ {print $1; exit}')"
            fi

            if [ -b "$DEVICE" ]; then
              DISK="$DEVICE"
            elif [ -n "$NVME_DEV" ] && [ -b "$NVME_DEV" ]; then
              DISK="$NVME_DEV"
            else
              DISK=""
            fi

            mkdir -p /data
            if [ -n "$DISK" ]; then
              if ! blkid "$DISK" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
                mkfs.xfs -f "$DISK"
              fi
              UUID="$(blkid -s UUID -o value "$DISK" || true)"
              if [ -n "$UUID" ]; then
                grep -q "$UUID" /etc/fstab || echo "UUID=$UUID /data xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
              else
                grep -q "$DISK" /etc/fstab || echo "$DISK /data xfs defaults,nofail 0 2" >> /etc/fstab
              fi
              mount -a
              chown -R ec2-user:ec2-user /data || true
            fi

  EC2Instance1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Select [0, !Ref SubnetIds]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-01
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolume1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance1.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-data-01
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolumeAttachment1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance1
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume1

  EC2Instance2:
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Select [1, !Ref SubnetIds]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-02
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolume2:
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance2.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-data-02
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolumeAttachment2:
    Condition: CreateInstance2
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance2
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume2

  EC2Instance3:
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Select [2, !Ref SubnetIds]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-03
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolume3:
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance3.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-data-03
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolumeAttachment3:
    Condition: CreateInstance3
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance3
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume3

  EC2Instance4:
    Condition: CreateInstance4
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Select [3, !Ref SubnetIds]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-04
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolume4:
    Condition: CreateInstance4
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance4.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-data-04
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolumeAttachment4:
    Condition: CreateInstance4
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance4
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume4

  EC2Instance5:
    Condition: CreateInstance5
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Select [4, !Ref SubnetIds]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-05
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolume5:
    Condition: CreateInstance5
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance5.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-data-05
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolumeAttachment5:
    Condition: CreateInstance5
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance5
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume5

  EC2Instance6:
    Condition: CreateInstance6
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      LaunchTemplate:
        LaunchTemplateId: !Ref LaunchTemplate
        Version: !GetAtt LaunchTemplate.LatestVersionNumber
      SubnetId: !Select [5, !Ref SubnetIds]
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-06
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolume6:
    Condition: CreateInstance6
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !GetAtt EC2Instance6.AvailabilityZone
      Size: !Ref DataVolumeSizeGiB
      VolumeType: !Ref DataVolumeType
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: !Sub ${ApplicationName}-data-06
        - Key: Application
          Value: !Ref ApplicationName

  DataVolumeAttachment6:
    Condition: CreateInstance6
    Type: AWS::EC2::VolumeAttachment
    Properties:
      Device: !Ref DataDeviceName
      InstanceId: !Ref EC2Instance6
      VolumeId: !Ref DataVolume6

Outputs:
  SecurityGroupId:
    Value: !Ref InstanceSecurityGroup
  InstanceIds:
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref EC2Instance1
        - !If [CreateInstance2, !Ref EC2Instance2, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance3, !Ref EC2Instance3, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance4, !Ref EC2Instance4, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance5, !Ref EC2Instance5, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance6, !Ref EC2Instance6, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
  DataVolumeIds:
    Value: !Join
      - ','
      - - !Ref DataVolume1
        - !If [CreateInstance2, !Ref DataVolume2, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance3, !Ref DataVolume3, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance4, !Ref DataVolume4, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance5, !Ref DataVolume5, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
        - !If [CreateInstance6, !Ref DataVolume6, !Ref AWS::NoValue]
